hypothesis: A two-stage evaluation workflow in which an ML formation-energy predictor selects the 10% of generated structures with highest prediction uncertainty for full DFT relaxation and convex-hull analysis will reproduce the full-DTF-derived SUN score within ±0.02 absolute for at least 90% of tested generative-model runs on Materials Project and OQMD subsets while reducing the number of required DFT calculations by ≥80%.
